productName: Shatter J's Infused Blunt Pineapple Express - 1g
description: A hybrid blunt of Pineapple Express taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of pineapple, tropical, and citrus, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
